sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for this shmup

special_mechanics.name: Starship Control
special_mechanics.description: Player pilots the Final Star starship with two-level weapon power system. No secondary weapons like missiles or bombs.

special_mechanics.name: Regional Movement Differences
special_mechanics.description: Larios movement and bullets speed were made slower in European version compared to Japanese version. Japanese version has longer Larios appearance time after theme starts.

special_mechanics.name: Spawn Prevention Bug (Japanese version only)
special_mechanics.description: In Japanese Famicom version, player can prevent new enemies from spawning by not shooting enemies already on screen. This bug was fixed in NES versions, making them debatably more difficult.

tier_notes: Tier 3: Empirical/qualitative data only. Star Force is a vertical scrolling shooter, not a character platformer, so traditional movement physics (walk speed, jump velocity, gravity) are not applicable. Game data focuses on enemy behavior, weapons system, and regional differences rather than precise movement parameters. No ROM-level physics documentation available.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Star Force (NES)
